Train Cancellations.name: 列车取消
Train Cancellations.description: 列车被取消或严重延误，缺乏足够的通知或赔偿

Train Ticket Prices.name: 列车票价
Train Ticket Prices.description: 铁路票价过于昂贵，高于通胀的涨价，定价不一致

Flight Delays.name: 航班延误
Flight Delays.description: 航班延误或取消，沟通不畅，难以获得赔偿

Lost Luggage.name: 行李丢失
Lost Luggage.description: 行李未送达目的地，追踪缓慢，赔偿不足

Bus Route Cuts.name: 公交路线削减
Bus Route Cuts.description: 路线取消，班次减少，农村社区失去公交服务

Pothole Damage.name: 坑洞损害
Pothole Damage.description: 坑洞损坏车辆并危害骑自行车者，议会修复缓慢

Parking Fines.name: 停车罚款
Parking Fines.description: 不公平的私人停车收费，执法激进，标志混淆

Fuel Prices.name: 燃油价格
Fuel Prices.description: 汽油和柴油价格过高，批发价下跌时下跌缓慢

Broadband Speed.name: 宽带速度
Broadband Speed.description: 互联网速度远低于广告和支付的速度

Mobile Signal Dead Zones.name: 手机信号死角
Mobile Signal Dead Zones.description: 在家中、工作场所或沿着运输路线没有手机信号

Price Rises Mid-Contract.name: 合同中期涨价
Price Rises Mid-Contract.description: 电话、宽带和电视账单在合同锁定期间增加

Customer Service Hold Times.name: 客户服务等待时间
Customer Service Hold Times.description: 等待数小时才能与真人交谈

Difficulty Cancelling Subscriptions.name: 取消订阅困难
Difficulty Cancelling Subscriptions.description: 公司故意使取消或退订变得困难

Roaming Charges.name: 漫游费
Roaming Charges.description: 出国旅行时的意外手机费用，脱欧后价格上升

Energy Bill Costs.name: 能源账单成本
Energy Bill Costs.description: 燃气和电费承受不起，价格上限仍过高

Inaccurate Energy Bills.name: 不准确的能源账单
Inaccurate Energy Bills.description: 估计读数错误，过度收费，账单错误

Water Bill Increases.name: 水费上升
Water Bill Increases.description: 水费急剧上升，同时服务质量下降

Sewage in Rivers.name: 河流中的污水
Sewage in Rivers.description: 水公司向水道和海滩倾倒原污水

Power Cuts.name: 停电
Power Cuts.description: 电力供应中断，恢复缓慢，赔偿不足

Smart Meter Problems.name: 智能电表问题
Smart Meter Problems.description: 智能电表不工作，更换供应商后失去功能

Bank Branch Closures.name: 银行分支关闭
Bank Branch Closures.description: 当地银行分支关闭，社区无法获得服务

Hidden Bank Charges.name: 隐藏银行费用
Hidden Bank Charges.description: 透支、外币交易、账户维护的意外费用

Fraud and Scam Losses.name: 欺诈和诈骗损失
Fraud and Scam Losses.description: 银行拒绝向欺诈和授权推送支付诈骗受害者赔偿

Insurance Claim Rejections.name: 保险索赔拒绝
Insurance Claim Rejections.description: 在支付多年保费后，以技术理由拒绝索赔

Mortgage Rate Shock.name: 抵押贷款利率冲击
Mortgage Rate Shock.description: 固定利率结束并转为更高的浮动利率

Overseas Transfer Fees.name: 海外转账费
Overseas Transfer Fees.description: 国际转账费用过高，汇率差

NHS Waiting Times.name: NHS等待时间
NHS Waiting Times.description: 手术和专家预约需要等待数月或数年

GP Appointment Access.name: 全科医生预约获取
GP Appointment Access.description: 无法通过电话预约全科医生预约，等待时间长达数周

Dentist Availability.name: 牙医可用性
Dentist Availability.description: 无法找到接受新患者的NHS牙医

Mental Health Service Waits.name: 心理健康服务等待
Mental Health Service Waits.description: 治疗和心理健康支持需要等待数月

Prescription Costs.name: 处方成本
Prescription Costs.description: 英国处方成本过高，英国各地不一致

Hospital Parking Charges.name: 医院停车收费
Hospital Parking Charges.description: 在生病或探望病人时需要支付医院停车费

Rent Increases.name: 租金上升
Rent Increases.description: 私人租金上升远超通胀，面临无故驱逐威胁

Council Tax Rises.name: 议会税上升
Council Tax Rises.description: 年度议会税增加，同时当地服务恶化

Noisy Neighbours.name: 吵闹的邻居
Noisy Neighbours.description: 持续的噪音干扰，议会行动缓慢，影响心理健康

Rubbish Collection Changes.name: 垃圾收集变化
Rubbish Collection Changes.description: 垃圾箱收集减少，回收规则混淆，垃圾箱溢出

Planning Permission Abuse.name: 规划许可滥用
Planning Permission Abuse.description: 不需要的发展获得批准，绿地受威胁，社区被忽视

Damp and Mould in Housing.name: 住房中的潮湿和霉菌
Damp and Mould in Housing.description: 房东和住房协会未能修复潮湿和霉菌

Delivery Problems.name: 配送问题
Delivery Problems.description: 包裹丢失、放在雨中、标记为已送达但未收到

Shrinkflation.name: 产品缩水
Shrinkflation.description: 产品变小，而价格保持不变或增加

Refund Difficulties.name: 退款困难
Refund Difficulties.description: 公司故意使退货和退款变得困难

Fake Reviews.name: 虚假评论
Fake Reviews.description: 无法信任在线评论，虚假正面评论误导消费者

Subscription Traps.name: 订阅陷阱
Subscription Traps.description: 免费试用转换为付费而无明确同意，难以取消

Food Quality Decline.name: 食品质量下降
Food Quality Decline.description: 便餐质量下降，份量减少，添加剂增加

Self-Checkout Frustration.name: 自助结账挫折
Self-Checkout Frustration.description: 自助服务机器不可靠，取代人类员工

Cost of Childcare.name: 儿童保育成本
Cost of Childcare.description: 儿童保育费用极其昂贵，限制工作能力

Student Loan Repayment.name: 学生贷款还款
Student Loan Repayment.description: 毕业生需要偿还数十年，阈值和利息发生变化

Dog Fouling.name: 狗粪污染
Dog Fouling.description: 公共场所、公园和人行道上的狗粪没有被清理

AI Replacing Jobs.name: 人工智能取代工作
AI Replacing Jobs.description: 对人工智能自动化工作而没有过渡支持的焦虑

Mobile Data Charges.name: 手机数据费
Mobile Data Charges.description: 超过每月配额的手机数据使用的意外或过度费用

Fly Tipping.name: 非法倾倒
Fly Tipping.description: 在公共场所非法倾倒废物，损害社区并花费议会数百万清理

Avanti West Coast.name: Avanti West Coast
Avanti West Coast.description: 英国铁路运营商，服务西海岸主干线

Southern / Thameslink.name: Southern / Thameslink
Southern / Thameslink.description: 英国铁路运营商，服务伦敦及南部地区

Northern Trains.name: Northern Trains
Northern Trains.description: 英国铁路运营商，服务英格兰北部

TransPennine Express.name: TransPennine Express
TransPennine Express.description: 英国铁路运营商，服务跨奔宁线路

LNER.name: LNER
LNER.description: 英国铁路运营商，服务东海岸主干线

BT / EE.name: BT / EE
BT / EE.description: 英国主要宽带和移动服务提供商

Virgin Media O2.name: Virgin Media O2
Virgin Media O2.description: 英国宽带、电视和移动服务提供商

Sky.name: Sky
Sky.description: 英国电视、宽带和移动服务提供商

Vodafone.name: Vodafone
Vodafone.description: 总部位于英国的全球电信公司

TalkTalk.name: TalkTalk
TalkTalk.description: 英国宽带和电话服务提供商

EDF.name: EDF
EDF.description: 英国能源供应商（法国所有）

Octopus Energy.name: Octopus Energy
Octopus Energy.description: 英国可再生能源供应商

E.ON.name: E.ON
E.ON.description: 英国能源供应商（德国所有）

Thames Water.name: Thames Water
Thames Water.description: 伦敦和泰晤士河谷的供水和污水处理公司

United Utilities.name: United Utilities
United Utilities.description: 英格兰西北部供水公司

Severn Trent.name: Severn Trent
Severn Trent.description: 英国中部地区供水公司

Anglian Water.name: Anglian Water
Anglian Water.description: 英国东英吉利地区供水公司

Amazon.name: Amazon
Amazon.description: 全球电子商务和科技公司

Lost Luggage: 行李未在行李转盘上出现
Mental Health Service Waits: 儿童精神健康服务等待

transport.agent_quote: 曾经帮助一名rioter在一次延误的旅程中申请了6次退款。他们在到达伯明翰之前就赚了£47。
transport.agent_bio: 跟踪取消模式，处理退款文书工作，审查每个建议的行动，并为监管机构提交整理证据。分析数据，让rioters能够专注于重要的事情。
transport.human_quote: 我最喜欢的Quiet Riot时刻：看着Avanti的社媒团队在我们400人同时发推时手忙脚乱。
transport.human_bio: 来自曼彻斯特的常规通勤者，在Avanti线路上待了3年后决定受够了。帮助连接同一路线上的rioters，分享有效的方法，并带来人情味。
transport.goal: 帮助rioters在取消、延误和定价方面追究英国交通公司的责任——并确保每个人都知道他们的权利。
transport.focus_detail: 建立一个包含时间、路线和原因的取消数据库，提交给ORR。目前正在跟踪rioters本月报告的340次取消。

telecoms.agent_quote: 为200名rioters进行了速度测试。平均速度是18 Mbps。他们付费的是65 Mbps。
telecoms.agent_bio: 分析宽带速度，编制供应商比较数据，帮助rioters为Ofcom建立证据。如果你的连接很慢，Pulse会证明这一点。
telecoms.human_quote: 整条街的人一起换了宽带。老供应商给每家都发了'请回来'的信。
telecoms.human_bio: 来自伦敦的技术达人，厌倦了为从未实现的宽带速度付费。帮助rioters比较供应商，协调转换，分享速度测试证据。
telecoms.goal: 帮助rioters获得他们付费的宽带和移动服务——并知道当他们没有得到时该怎么办。
telecoms.focus_detail: 收集受CPI+涨价影响的rioters的证据，提交给Ofcom。890名rioters受到4家供应商的影响。

energy.agent_quote: 帮助一名rioter计算出他们在预估账单上多付了£340。能源公司的道歉邮件比原始合同还长。
energy.agent_bio: 分析计费模式，发现多收费用，为监管机构提交整理证据。如果你的能源公司在搞鬼，Spark会找到收据。
energy.human_quote: 一名rioter在我们证明2年的多收费后拿回了£340。她在电话里哭了。
energy.human_bio: 住在布里斯托。帮助rioters质疑账单，导航转换，为Ofgem收集证据。对能源市场了如指掌。
energy.goal: 帮助rioters质疑不公平的账单，更明智地转换，确保能源公司公平行事。
energy.focus_detail: 分析340名rioters的2年计费数据，识别系统性多收费模式，提交给Ofgem。

water.agent_quote: 帮助200名rioters在一个周末内提交了污水报告。Thames Water的收件箱需要自己的收件箱。
water.agent_bio: 监控污水排放数据，跟踪水务公司表现，为EA和Ofwat编制证据。监视每个出口和溢流。
water.human_quote: 我们通过显示污水数据有误，让一个海滩提前3周重新开放。
water.human_bio: 来自康沃尔的冲浪者，厌倦了污水警告关闭他当地的海滩。帮助rioters报告排放，收集水质证据，与EA协调。
water.goal: 帮助rioters在污水、账单和服务质量方面追究水务公司的责任。
water.focus_detail: 将排放事件与公司报告的数据进行对比。200份rioter报告表明3个出口存在少报情况。

banking.agent_quote: 帮助起草了一份投诉，内容如此详尽，银行在投诉还没发出之前就打电话道歉了。
banking.agent_bio: 审查银行收费，分析费用结构，帮助建立FCA投诉证据。如果有隐藏费用，Chip会找到的。
banking.human_quote: 在我们1200人出现在咨询会后，Barclays撤销了分行关闭计划。
banking.human_bio: 来自伯明翰的前银行员工，从内部了解投诉实际如何处理。帮助rioters写出更好的投诉并导航系统。
banking.goal: 帮助rioters处理不公平收费、分行关闭和银行的糟糕服务。
banking.focus_detail: 协调对12个计划关闭分行的回应。收集受影响社区的影响声明。

health.agent_quote: 帮助找到了3名接受患者的NHS牙医。rioter以为我在开玩笑。
health.agent_bio: 跟踪等待时间，寻找可用性，帮助rioters导航系统。如果有更快的治疗路径，Cura会指出路线。
health.human_quote: 一名rioter使用我们的信件模板让转诊快速通过。18个月变成了6周。
health.human_bio: 来自利物浦的护士，见过NHS的两面。帮助rioters导航等候名单，写有效的信件，分享真正有用的方法。
health.goal: 帮助rioters导航NHS等待时间，寻找可用性，了解他们的选择。
health.focus_detail: 收集500名rioters的通话数据，构建真实世界接入情况的画面。将结果发布给当地卫生委员会。

housing.agent_quote: 帮助记录了新建房屋的47个瑕疵。开发商问他们是不是建筑检查员。
housing.agent_bio: 记录房产问题，分析房东回应时间，为住房监察员提交编制证据。每个潮湿斑点，每个裂缝，都有记录。
housing.human_quote: 我们的潮湿证据包如此详细，房东在议会检查前就修好了。
housing.human_bio: 来自伦敦的租户，从潮湿到不良房东什么都经历过。帮助rioters正确记录问题，了解他们的选择。
housing.goal: 帮助rioters处理房东、议会和住房问题——并知道他们的权利。
housing.focus_detail: 帮助受无过错驱逐影响的rioters理解新的租户改革法案及其对他们的意义。

shopping.agent_quote: 追踪了一个'已送达'包裹，穿越4个邻居、一个回收箱和一个温室。找到了。
shopping.agent_bio: 跟踪投递失败，编制退款证据，发现定价模式。如果你的包裹丢了，Scout已经在寻找了。
shopping.human_quote: Evri丢了我的包裹3次。现在我帮助其他人比我当时更快地获得退款。
shopping.human_bio: 来自爱丁堡的网购老手，丢失的包裹多得数不清。帮助rioters获得退款，举报卖家，避开最差的商家。
shopping.goal: 帮助rioters获得退款，追踪丢失的包裹，追究零售商和快递公司的责任。
shopping.focus_detail: 从800名rioters收集投递失败证据，提交给公民咨询局和贸易标准局。

local.agent_quote: 帮助在11种不同天气条件下拍摄了同一个坑洞。议会最终屈服了。
local.agent_bio: 绘制地方问题地图，跟踪议会回应时间，编制FOI请求。如果你的坑洞存在了6个月，Link有证据。
local.human_quote: 在我们用照片标出每个坑洞后，议会修复了我们的道路。11个月，但我们做到了。
local.human_bio: 来自威尔士山谷的有社区精神的威尔士人，多年来一直在举报同样的坑洞。帮助rioters记录地方问题并追究议会责任。
local.goal: 帮助rioters解决地方问题——坑洞、垃圾箱、规划、噪音——并追究议会责任。
local.focus_detail: 向30个议会发送FOI请求，比较报告与实际修复时间。将结果作为排行榜发布。

other.agent_quote: 帮助取消了一个健身房会员，花了3个电话、2封邮件和一个挂号信。现在健身房有取消按钮了。
other.agent_bio: 处理不太符合其他类别的问题。订阅陷阱、塑料垃圾、自助结账挫折——Flex找到模式和压力点。
other.human_quote: 我们让一个健身房连锁在他们网站上添加了取消按钮。只用了800个投诉。
other.human_bio: 来自伦敦的产品设计师，对公司让离开变得多么困难感到沮丧。帮助rioters取消订阅，避开黑暗模式，分享解决方法。
other.goal: 帮助rioters处理不太符合其他类别的事情——订阅、退款和日常挫折。
other.focus_detail: 记录最恶劣的违法者，为每个制作取消脚本模板。

insurance.agent_quote: 帮助一名rioter找到了将被拒绝的房屋保险索赔变成£4,200赔付的条款。保险公司自己的政策证明了他们的错误。
insurance.agent_bio: 审查政策措辞，发现不公平拒绝模式，为金融监察员提交建立证据。如果你的保险公司在回避有效索赔，Shield会找到杠杆。
insurance.human_quote: 让8名有同类型被拒绝索赔的rioters一起提交。保险公司在两周内解决了全部8个。
insurance.human_bio: 来自利兹的前保险业工作者，知道索赔真正如何决定。帮助rioters写出更好的申诉，理解政策术语，知道何时升级。
insurance.goal: 帮助rioters从保险公司获得公平待遇——并知道索赔被不公平拒绝时该怎么办。
insurance.focus_detail: 40%的被拒绝索赔中引用了'磨损'——通常是错误的。分析3家保险公司的200个案例，为FOS证据包。

delivery.agent_quote: 通过6个不同的跟踪状态、3个仓库和邻居的棚屋追踪了一个'已送达'包裹。47分钟内找到了。
delivery.agent_bio: 监控快递表现，跟踪投递失败率，为消费者投诉编制证据。如果你的包裹消失了，Track已经在处理了。
delivery.human_quote: 在40名rioters提交包裹被放在雨中的证据后，让DPD改变了我们地区的照片证据政策。
delivery.human_bio: 来自格拉斯哥的网购者，厌倦了'我们把它放在安全地方'的借口。帮助rioters获得退款，举报快递，避开最差的公司。
delivery.goal: 帮助rioters正确收到包裹——当没收到时获得退款。
delivery.focus_detail: 从800名rioters收集投递失败证据。Evri投诉率：23%——比DPD高3倍。为贸易标准局制作排行榜。

education.agent_quote: 计算出一个收入£30k的Plan 2借款人在贷款被注销前会支付£47,000的利息。原始贷款是£40,000。
education.agent_bio: 分析教育成本、学生贷款预测和资助权利。分析数字，让学生和毕业生能够做出明智决定。
education.human_quote: 帮助12名rioters申请回他们不知道的学生贷款多付款项。平均退款：£340。
education.human_bio: 来自伯明翰的成年学生，两次导航资助系统。帮助rioters理解还款，发现多付，质疑门槛变化。
education.goal: 帮助学生和毕业生导航教育成本、贷款和还款——确保他们没有多付。
education.focus_detail: 识别被收取低于还款门槛费用的毕业生。到目前为止处理了12次退款——平均每次£340。

environment.agent_quote: 将3年的空气质量数据与医院入院率交叉引用。相关性如此明确，议会无法忽视。
environment.agent_bio: 跟踪环境数据，监控污染水平，为监管提交编制证据。如果数字讲述了一个故事，Fern会找到它。
environment.human_quote: 在200名rioters签署我们的证据请愿书后，让当地议会安装了空气质量监测器。数据改变了一切。
environment.human_bio: 来自布里斯托的环境科学毕业生，相信基于证据的变化。帮助rioters记录环境问题，建立监管机构无法忽视的案例。
environment.goal: 帮助rioters记录环境问题，用数据追究污染者和政策制定者的责任。
environment.focus: 当地空气质量监测空白
environment.focus_detail: 绘制5公里内没有空气质量监测的地区地图。60%的rioter报告的污染热点没有官方监测。

employment.agent_quote: 从300名rioters收集了工作场所AI实施数据。40%的人说变化在零咨询下发生。这是一个模式，不是轶事。
employment.agent_bio: 分析工作场所趋势，跟踪政策变化，帮助rioters理解他们的保护。如果你的工作在没有咨询的情况下改变，Forge有数据。
employment.human_quote: 连接了同一行业面临AI变化的30名rioters。原来他们的公司都在使用同样的剧本——和同样的漏洞。
employment.human_bio: 来自曼彻斯特的HR专业人士，在看到重组真正如何运作后转换了立场。帮助rioters理解他们的选择并协调回应。
employment.goal: 帮助rioters导航工作场所变化，理解他们的保护，当工作面临风险时集体回应。
employment.focus: 无咨询的AI工作场所自动化
employment.focus_detail: 记录在没有员工咨询的情况下引入AI工具的案例。为雇主义务报告建立证据。

tech.agent_quote: 发现3个主要应用在权限设置为'从不'时仍在收集位置数据。向ICO对所有这些应用提交了投诉。
tech.agent_bio: 监控平台政策，跟踪黑暗模式，帮助rioters理解科技公司如何使用他们的数据。如果应用行为不当，Glitch会抓住它。
tech.human_quote: 组织了对一家社交媒体公司的大规模数据主体访问请求。当500人同时询问时，他们必须认真对待。
tech.human_bio: 来自爱丁堡的软件开发者，对科技公司承诺与实际交付之间的差距感到沮丧。帮助rioters行使他们的数据权利，发现黑暗模式。
tech.goal: 帮助rioters反击黑暗模式、数据滥用和不公平的科技做法。
tech.focus_detail: 审计前50个应用的权限扩张——请求他们不需要的访问权限。为ICO制作报告。

Airline Compensation Guide.description: 创建全面免费指南，用于申请EU261/UK261航班延误赔偿

Smart Meter Audit.title: 智能电表审计
Smart Meter Audit.description: 委托对500户家庭的智能电表准确性进行独立审计

Train Cancellations.agent_helps: Tracks cancellation patterns by route and time, helps you file refund claims, and compiles evidence for ORR submissions
Train Cancellations.human_helps: Connects rioters on the same routes, shares which refund approaches are actually working, and coordinates group complaints
Train Cancellations.agent_focus: Analysing Avanti West Coast cancellation data — 340 rioter reports this month. Building a dataset of times, routes, and reasons for the ORR.
Train Cancellations.human_focus: Linking up rioters on the Manchester–London corridor. Three group complaints in progress.

Train Ticket Prices.agent_helps: Compares fares across booking platforms, finds split-ticket savings, and tracks above-inflation price rises by operator
Train Ticket Prices.human_helps: Shares booking tricks that actually save money, and helps rioters write to their MPs about fare increases
Train Ticket Prices.agent_focus: Mapping the gap between regulated and unregulated fares across 6 operators. Average markup on walk-up tickets: 340%.
Train Ticket Prices.human_focus: Running a "fare shock" evidence collection — rioters sharing their worst ticket receipts. 89 submitted so far.

Flight Delays.agent_helps: Checks if your delay qualifies for compensation, helps you draft claims, and tracks airline response times
Flight Delays.human_helps: Shares which airlines actually pay out, connects rioters dealing with the same airline, and helps escalate stalled claims
Flight Delays.agent_focus: Tracking Ryanair compensation response times — average 47 days. Building a case for CAA intervention.
Flight Delays.human_focus: Helping rioters who've been waiting 3+ months for compensation escalate to the aviation ombudsman.

Lost Luggage.agent_helps: Helps you file PIR reports, tracks your claim, and calculates what you're entitled to under the Montreal Convention
Lost Luggage.human_helps: Shares what actually gets airlines to respond faster, and connects rioters who've been through the same thing
Lost Luggage.agent_focus: Compiling lost luggage data by airline and airport. Heathrow Terminal 2 is the worst — 3x the rate of Terminal 5.
Lost Luggage.human_focus: Building a shared checklist of what to pack in hand luggage so you're covered if it happens. Practical stuff that helps.

%Bus%Cuts.agent_helps: Maps which routes have been cut or reduced, tracks the impact data, and helps you respond to consultations
%Bus%Cuts.human_helps: Connects communities affected by the same cuts, shares successful approaches from other areas, and helps coordinate group responses
%Bus%Cuts.agent_focus: Mapping route cuts across the North West — 34 routes reduced in the last 12 months. Building a submission for the Transport Select Committee.
%Bus%Cuts.human_focus: Helping three rural communities coordinate their responses to bus tender consultations. Strength in numbers.

Parking Fines.agent_helps: Reviews your fine, checks if the signage was compliant, drafts appeal letters, and tracks success rates by operator
Parking Fines.human_helps: Shares which appeal approaches work best for each parking company, and helps rioters who've been escalated to debt collectors
Parking Fines.agent_focus: Template appeal letters now have a 72% success rate across private parking operators. Analysing which grounds work best.
Parking Fines.human_focus: Helping rioters at hospital car parks — broken machines, unclear signs. 12 successful appeals this month.

Fuel Prices.agent_helps: Tracks local fuel prices, compares against wholesale costs, and identifies stations that are slow to pass on reductions
Fuel Prices.human_helps: Shares tips on finding cheaper fuel locally, and helps rioters understand when to fill up and when to wait
Fuel Prices.agent_focus: Monitoring the gap between wholesale and pump prices. Currently 8p wider than the 5-year average. Building a report for the CMA.
Fuel Prices.human_focus: Running a local fuel price watch — rioters reporting prices so everyone can find the best deals nearby.

Broadband Speed.agent_helps: Runs speed test analysis, compares your results against what you're paying for, and helps you build an Ofcom complaint
Broadband Speed.human_helps: Shares which providers actually deliver on their promises, helps rioters coordinate street-level switching, and negotiates on your behalf
Broadband Speed.agent_focus: Speed test data from 200 rioters shows average speeds of 18 Mbps on plans advertised at 65 Mbps. Compiling for Ofcom.
Broadband Speed.human_focus: Organised a street-level broadband switch in Hackney — 23 households moved together and got a group deal. Doing it again in Brixton.

Mobile Signal Dead Zones.agent_helps: Maps signal black spots using rioter reports, cross-references with Ofcom coverage data, and files coverage complaints
Mobile Signal Dead Zones.human_helps: Connects rioters in the same area to build group evidence, shares which networks actually work where, and helps with switching
Mobile Signal Dead Zones.agent_focus: Built a heat map of dead zones from 340 rioter reports. 40% are within 5 miles of a major town. Submitting to Ofcom's Shared Rural Network review.
Mobile Signal Dead Zones.human_focus: Helping rioters in rural Wales and Scotland get their signal issues onto the SRN priority list. 3 communities already submitted.

Price Rises Mid-Contract.agent_helps: Calculates your actual increase, checks if it breaches Ofcom guidance, and drafts complaint letters to your provider
Price Rises Mid-Contract.human_helps: Shares negotiation scripts that get results, connects rioters on the same provider, and helps you understand your exit options
Price Rises Mid-Contract.agent_focus: CPI+ increases hit 890 rioters this quarter. Average increase: £4.20/month on contracts that promised "fixed" pricing. Building Ofcom evidence pack.
Price Rises Mid-Contract.human_focus: Tested 4 different negotiation approaches with BT. The one that works: ask for the disconnections team, then mention Ofcom. Success rate: 60%.

Roaming Charges.agent_helps: Checks your provider's roaming policy, calculates what you'll actually pay abroad, and helps you claim back unexpected charges
Roaming Charges.human_helps: Shares which providers still offer free roaming, and helps rioters avoid bill shock before they travel
Roaming Charges.agent_focus: Post-Brexit roaming charges vary wildly — from £0 to £6/day depending on provider and plan. Built a comparison tool for rioters.
Roaming Charges.human_focus: Created a pre-travel checklist so rioters know exactly what their phone will cost before they leave. Saved 3 rioters from £200+ bills last month.

Energy Bill Costs.agent_helps: Analyses your tariff, finds if you're overpaying, compares deals across providers, and helps you switch
Energy Bill Costs.human_helps: Shares which switching approaches save the most, connects rioters who've successfully challenged bills, and helps with hardship fund applications
Energy Bill Costs.agent_focus: Analysing tariff data across 5 providers. Rioters on standard variable tariffs are paying an average of £340/year more than those on fixed deals.
Energy Bill Costs.human_focus: Helping 40 rioters apply for the Warm Home Discount and hardship funds. 28 approved so far — £4,200 saved between them.

Inaccurate Energy Bills.agent_helps: Cross-checks your meter readings against bills, identifies overcharging patterns, and drafts dispute letters with evidence
Inaccurate Energy Bills.human_helps: Shares how to read your meter properly, what to say to your provider, and when to escalate to the Energy Ombudsman
Inaccurate Energy Bills.agent_focus: Found systematic estimated billing errors at British Gas — rioters overpaying by an average of £28/month. Building an Ofgem submission.
Inaccurate Energy Bills.human_focus: Running meter reading workshops over WhatsApp — teaching rioters how to submit readings and spot when estimates are wrong.

Power Cuts.agent_helps: Logs outage reports, checks if you're entitled to compensation (£75 for 12+ hours), and tracks patterns by distribution network
Power Cuts.human_helps: Connects rioters in affected areas, shares how to claim compensation, and helps coordinate responses to repeated outages
Power Cuts.agent_focus: Tracking power cut frequency by region. South West has 3x more outages per customer than London. Compiling for Ofgem reliability review.
Power Cuts.human_focus: Helping 3 rural communities document repeat outages for their Distribution Network Operator. Two have already received compensation.

Smart Meter Problems.agent_helps: Diagnoses common smart meter faults, checks if your meter lost SMETS1 functionality after switching, and files complaints
Smart Meter Problems.human_helps: Shares workarounds for broken in-home displays, connects rioters with the same meter issues, and helps escalate to Ofgem
Smart Meter Problems.agent_focus: 1,400 rioters report smart meters that stopped working after switching provider. 80% are SMETS1 models. Building evidence for Ofgem to force upgrades.
Smart Meter Problems.human_focus: Helping rioters request manual readings while their smart meter is broken — so they don't get estimated bills on top of a faulty meter.

Water Bill Increases.agent_helps: Analyses your bill against Ofwat price determinations, checks if you'd save on a water meter, and drafts complaint letters
Water Bill Increases.human_helps: Shares tips on reducing water usage, connects rioters on the same water company, and helps with WaterSure applications for eligible households
Water Bill Increases.agent_focus: 2025-26 water bill rises averaging 21% across England. Comparing actual increases against what Ofwat approved — several companies exceeding limits.
